title: Suppress Archived Child Audit Pressure
goal: Implement #470 so finished-work inspection and compact summary stop recommending promotion of an archived child slice when a live active plan already owns the continuation for the same parent lane.
non_goals: Do not delete archived closeout evidence.
Do not hide genuinely dangling partial closeouts.
Do not add host-specific tracker assumptions.

intent.outcome: Archived child continuations that are already routed to an active same-parent plan are marked as routed historical evidence instead of active promotion candidates.
intent.constraints: Keep full/audit evidence available and preserve promotion pressure for dangling continuation records.
intent.latitude: Add a narrow active-continuation detector using checked-in plan references and existing role-aware issue refs.
intent.escalation: Escalate if suppression cannot distinguish same-parent active continuation from unrelated active work.

execution.next_step: Archive this completed slice and continue with the next #450 child lane.
execution.proof: planning package tests, ruff, planning surface check, proof selector, planning doctor

invariants: Archived evidence remains inspectable in full/audit views.
Dangling partial continuations still produce derived follow-up candidates.
The compact summary should prefer current active execution over historical child residue.

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: #450: make advanced features opt-in through feature tiers and merged surfaces.

required_continuation.required follow-on detail: #469/#467 remain after this slice unless validation proves they are satisfied or superseded.
required_continuation.activation trigger: after #470 closeout, refresh external evidence and promote the next #450 child indicated by validation

iterative_follow_through.what this slice enabled: Finished-work inspection now marks archived child continuations as routed when a live active plan owns the same parent lane, removing them from compact promotion pressure.
iterative_follow_through.discovered implications: This reduces autopilot churn from recently archived child slices without deleting audit evidence.
iterative_follow_through.proof achieved now: yes; planning package tests, ruff, planning-surface checks, proof selection, and planning doctor passed.
iterative_follow_through.next likely slice: refresh external evidence, then promote the next #450 child indicated by open issue state

delegated_judgment.requested outcome: Suppress archived child audit pressure when continuation is already active.
delegated_judgment.hard constraints: Do not hide genuinely dangling partial closeouts or remove audit evidence.
delegated_judgment.agent may decide locally: How to detect active same-parent continuation from checked-in references.
delegated_judgment.escalate when: The active plan cannot be linked to the archived child continuation without guessing.

system_intent_alignment.relevant system intent: Make the package streamlined, lightweight, frictionless, cheap, modular, and small while preserving leverage.
system_intent_alignment.slice shaping bias: Reduce noisy compact routing rather than adding new workflow surfaces.
system_intent_alignment.broader-lane validation question: Does compact summary route to the next real active lane instead of archived child residue?

active_milestone.scope: Keep this execution thread bounded to the promoted TODO item.

immediate_next_action: Archive the completed plan, refresh external evidence, and promote the next #450 child lane.
invariants: Archived evidence remains inspectable in full/audit views.
Dangling partial continuations still produce derived follow-up candidates.
The compact summary should prefer current active execution over historical child residue.
validation_commands: cd packages/planning && uv run pytest tests/test_installer.py -q
cd packages/planning && uv run ruff check .
uv run ruff check packages/planning/src packages/planning/tests

uv run agentic-workspace proof --target . --changed .agentic-workspace/planning/state.toml .agentic-workspace/planning/execplans/suppress-archived-child-audit-pressure.plan.json packages/planning/src/repo_planning_bootstrap/installer.py packages/planning/tests/test_installer.py --format json
uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json
completion_criteria: Compact summary does not recommend promoting archived completed children when a live active plan owns the same parent continuation.
Full/audit inspection still exposes routed archived evidence.
Dangling partial closeouts still produce promotion candidates.
Tests cover active-routed and dangling cases.

execution_summary.outcome delivered: finished-work inspection suppresses archived child continuation candidates when a live active plan already owns the same parent continuation.

execution_summary.post-work posterity capture: No Memory or docs promotion needed; tests and archived closeout carry the reusable behavior.
execution_summary.resume from: next #450 child lane after external evidence refresh

execution_run.what happened: Added active-continuation suppression for finished-work derived candidates and covered routed and dangling continuation behavior in planning tests.
execution_run.scope touched: packages/planning finished-work inspection plus focused tests and planning surfaces

execution_run.next step: archive this plan, close #470, refresh external evidence, then continue the next open child lane

finished_run_review.scope respected: yes; changes stayed inside planning inspection behavior, focused tests, and planning state.

finished_run_review.intent served: yes; compact summary no longer re-promotes already-routed #450 child residue while #470 is active.
finished_run_review.config compliance: yes; compact package commands and checked-in planning surfaces drove execution.
finished_run_review.misinterpretation risk: low; suppression requires an explicit unsolved intent plus same-parent active plan and does not affect dangling continuations.

drift_log: 2026-04-28: Promoted after #471 closeout because compact summary still pointed at the just-archived child continuation.
